# 📌 Pull Request Guidelines – DSA Technovate

Please follow all the instructions below while creating a Pull Request.

---

## 📁 Folder Structure (VERY IMPORTANT)

* Create your own folder using your name:

  Example:

  ```
  aryan_sharma/arrays/min_element.cpp
  gaurav/arrays/max_element.cpp
  ```

* Do NOT add files in root directory ❌

* Do NOT modify other student folders ❌

* Use lowercase and underscore naming (snake_case)

---

## 📌 Problem Details

* **Problem Name:**
* **Problem Number:**
* **Type:** DSA Assignment

---

## 🧠 Approach

Explain your logic clearly in 2–3 lines.

---

## ⚙️ Implementation

* Function/Class used
* Key steps

---

## 📊 Time Complexity

*

## 💾 Space Complexity

*

---

## ✅ Test Cases

Input:
Output:

---

## ⚠️ Edge Cases Handled

*

---

## 🔍 Checklist (Mandatory)

* [ ] No extra print statements (like "Enter input")
* [ ] Proper variable naming (camelCase)
* [ ] Code is clean and readable
* [ ] Function or class is used
* [ ] File placed in correct folder
* [ ] Comments added (problem statement + function description)

---

## 📝 Notes (Optional)

---

## ❗ Important Rules

* PR without proper description will NOT be accepted ❌
* PR without correct folder structure will be rejected ❌
* Follow standard DSA input/output format strictly

---

## 🚀 Submission Flow

Fork → Clone → Create Branch → Add Code → Commit → Push → Pull Request

---

💡 Tip: Write clean, readable, and interview-ready code.
